title: Deposit still within processing window
template: Hi {customer_name}, I understand you are waiting for your deposit to appear. I am checking the payment status for {payment_method}. If the normal processing window of {processing_window} has not passed yet, please allow that time first. {next_step}

title: Deposit proof request after waiting window
template: Hi {customer_name}, thanks for your patience. Since the normal deposit window has passed for the transaction on {transaction_date}, please share {required_proof}. Once we have it, we can forward the case for financial review.

title: Withdrawal under process
template: Hi {customer_name}, I understand you are waiting for your withdrawal. I checked that it is still under process for {payment_method}. Withdrawals can take up to {expected_window} depending on the method and review checks. We will continue monitoring it and update you if additional information is needed.

title: Processed withdrawal proof request
template: Hi {customer_name}, I understand the concern. The withdrawal shows as processed on {processed_date}. To investigate further, please share {proof_needed}. We will attach it to the financial review and follow up with the next confirmed update.

title: Verification pending restriction
template: Hi {customer_name}, your account currently requires verification before restrictions can be reviewed. Please upload the requested documents: {missing_documents}. Once all required documents are submitted, the review may take {review_window}. We cannot confirm restriction removal until the responsible team completes the review.

title: Bonus availability explanation
template: Hi {customer_name}, bonuses depend on the promo codes and offers available for your account. I checked the current bonus status as {bonus_status}. {next_step} Please note that only available offers can be applied, and bonus removal or withdrawal can affect bonus progress.

title: Chat hold and next-step message
template: Thanks, {customer_name}. I understand the issue is {issue_summary}. I am checking the details now. {next_step}

title: Hindi withdrawal under process
template: Namaste {customer_name}, main samajh sakta hoon ki aap apne withdrawal ko lekar chintit hain. Aapka request abhi process mein hai. Is method ke liye samanya roop se {expected_window} tak ka samay lag sakta hai. Agar hamein koi additional information chahiye hogi, hum aapko update karenge.
